items.h: AEW's Jeff Jarrett Reflects On Winning WWE Intercontinental Title, WCW World Title
items.p: Jeff Jarrett has drawn parallels between winning the WCW World Heavyweight Championship and the WWE Intercontinental title, rating the former more highly.

items.h: AEW's Konosuke Takeshita Retains TV Title At NJPW Dominion
items.p: Konosuke Takeshita remains a double champion as he retained his NJPW World Television Title at NJPW Dominion 2026.

items.h: Hikaru Shida And Persephone Qualify For AEW Survival Of The Fittest Match
items.p: Hikaru Shida and Persephone punched their tickets to the Survival of the Fittest match on July 1 with wins on "AEW Collision"

items.h: AEW's Andrade Loses Global Title At NJPW Dominion
items.p: Andrade El Idolo will return to AEW beltless as he lost his IWGP Global Heavyweight Title at NJPW Dominion 2026.
Five title changes took place at New Japan Pro Wrestling Dominion 2026 in Osaka-Jo Hall on Sunday. The only wrestler on the show to successfully defend his title was Konosuke Takeshita, who...

items.h: Kevin Knight Escapes AEW Collision With TNT Title
items.p: Kevin Knight is still your AEW TNT Champion following his successful title defense against Myron Reed on "AEW Collision."

items.h: Kay Lee Ray (WWE's Alba Fyre) Names AEW Stars She Hopes To Face
items.p: With a sea of potential new opponents available to her, Kay Lee Ray eyes dream matches with some All Elite Wrestling stars.

items.h: AEW star returns from injury, makes surprise appearance at NJPW Dominion
